# Mumbai London AF Clinic

> Specialist atrial fibrillation care in Mumbai from Professor Dhiraj Gupta, consultant cardiologist and electrophysiologist at Liverpool Heart and Chest Hospital.

## About

Mumbai London AF Clinic offers London-level electrophysiology expertise during scheduled visits to Mumbai. Professor Dhiraj Gupta performs catheter ablation (RFA and PFA), treats atrial fibrillation, atrial flutter, SVT, and related rhythm disorders, and coordinates continuous follow-up with local cardiologists between visits.

## Key pages

- Home: https://www.mumbailondonaf.com/
- Conditions we treat: https://www.mumbailondonaf.com/conditions
- Evidence (PFA vs RFA, outcomes, FAQs): https://www.mumbailondonaf.com/evidence
- Professor Gupta's career: https://www.mumbailondonaf.com/journey
- Testimonials and press: https://www.mumbailondonaf.com/testimonials
- Book a consultation / enquiry: https://www.mumbailondonaf.com/book

## Common questions

- PFA and RFA produce broadly comparable results in recent trials; operator experience is the strongest predictor of safety and success.
- Catheter ablation is a well-established procedure; complication rates are lower with high-volume operators.
- Consultations and procedures take place in Mumbai; UK travel is not required for routine care.
- Professor Gupta is trained in both RFA and PFA and selects the approach per patient.

## Contact

Book a consultation at https://www.mumbailondonaf.com/book
